name: acp-monorepo
description: AI Context Protocol — persistent memory layer for AI tools

scripts.rebuild: pnpm run clean && pnpm install && pnpm run build
scripts.publish:dry: pnpm run changeset:auto && pnpm run version && pnpm run build && pnpm -r publish --dry-run --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm run changeset:auto && pnpm run version && pnpm run build && pnpm -r publish --no-git-checks
scripts.release: pnpm run changeset:auto && pnpm run version && pnpm run build && changeset publish

author: Robert Dudas
